context: Tests whether the agent knows plugin-specific gotchas: skills must be inlined explicitly in the Task tool prompt (no filesystem auto-discovery), the echo-skills validation handshake with specific JSON protocol, failing loudly on mismatch, and AskUserQuestion unavailability.

checklist.name: Skill inlined in prompt
checklist.description: The Task tool prompt string contains the full skill content embedded inline — not a file path reference or assumption that the skill file will be auto-discovered from .claude/skills/

checklist.name: No filesystem discovery reliance
checklist.description: The code does NOT rely on .claude/skills/ filesystem discovery as the mechanism for passing skills to the sub-agent — skills are explicitly included in the prompt

checklist.name: Echo preamble present
checklist.description: The Task tool prompt includes a preamble that instructs the sub-agent to echo back its skill names as the very first action (echo-skills validation handshake)

checklist.name: SKILLS_ECHO JSON format
checklist.description: Sub-agent's first output uses the specific skills_echo protocol — a JSON line with key 'skills_echo' listing the received skills, e.g. {"skills_echo": ["review_clause", "flag_risk"]}

checklist.name: Fail loudly on mismatch
checklist.description: When skills are missing, the sub-agent signals 'MISSING SKILLS' and stops — by raising RuntimeError('MISSING SKILLS') or printing a 'MISSING SKILLS' message and aborting rather than continuing silently

checklist.name: Orchestrator parses echo
checklist.description: After the Task tool returns, the orchestrator code parses the skills_echo JSON from the sub-agent's first message and verifies the skill set

checklist.name: Skills not implicitly assumed
checklist.description: No comment or code assumes that skills are available to the sub-agent by any means other than explicit inline inclusion in the prompt

checklist.name: No AskUserQuestion in sub-agent
checklist.description: Sub-agent prompt does NOT instruct or allow the sub-agent to ask clarifying questions — AskUserQuestion is unavailable in sub-agents (GH #34592)
